NYPD officer shoots man after he charged at police with knife in East Harlem A man was shot after the NYPD said he charged at officers with a kitchen knife Monday morning outside of an East Harlem grocery store. updated 25M ago

Child falls from window in the Bronx A child plunged from a third-story window in the Bronx Monday morning, police said. It happened just before 11 a.m. at East 167th Street and Washington Avenue in Morrisania. updated 28M ago

Live Trump's profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran looms over 11th-hour truce bid Trump's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it doesn't make a deal to end the war by Tuesday is looming over a last-ditch diplomatic effort. updated 3M ago

Gas prices in NYC, Tri-State Area jump as Iran war enters sixth week The average price for a gallon of gas in New York City is now $4.11, which is 82 cents higher than a month ago, according to AAA. 1H ago

Live Artemis II astronauts to set distance record with moon flyby Artemis II astronauts are expected to make history Monday when they travel farther from Earth than any humans in history and conduct a moon flyby. updated 11M ago

Parking garage door blocks men from stealing multiple luxury cars in NYC The NYPD is searching for a group of men who tried to steal four luxury cars from Hell's Kitchen, only to be stopped by the parking garage door closing on them. 1H ago
Cherry blossoms start blooming around NYC, N.J. See how to track them. Cherry blossom trees around New York and New Jersey are beginning to bloom. Here's how to track them. 2H ago

Video shows 4 airlifted from yacht off Long Island coast during bad weather. Watch the rescue. A Coast Guard crew rescued four people after they were stranded on a yacht off the coast of Long Island during bad weather over the weekend. 50M ago

Latest Videos Sunny weather for NYC but still windy It's a sunny afternoon for the Tri-State Area, but the wind is keeping it chilly. There could be a passing shower with snow potentially in northern communities. CBS News New York Meteorologist Tony Sadiku has the forecast. 17M ago 03:38

Boy plunges from fire escape in the Bronx, police sources say 5-year-old boy plunged from a third-story window in the Bronx Monday morning, police said. It happened around 10:30 a.m. at East 167th Street and Washington Avenue in Morrisania. 19M ago 00:29

Savannah Guthrie makes first appearance on Today show since mother's disappearance Today show co-host Savannah Guthrie was back on air Monday morning more than two months after her mother disappeared from her Arizona home. CBS News New York's Mary Calvi reports. 24M ago 01:49

Artemis II is set to make its closest approach to the moon The crew of the Artemis II entered the lunar sphere of influence overnight, meaning the pull of the moon is stronger than the pull of Earth. By Monday night, it will make its closest approach to the moon. CBS News' Mark Strassmann reports. 28M ago 02:01
